name: docs-sync-validate-before-push

related_skills.name: code-review
related_skills.why: Review the doc diff for accuracy/consistency before proposing to commit.

citations: pattern: read docs before editing to fix stale content
pattern: grepped for all BRAINSTORM references before deleting/updating
pattern: answered incremental-cost question by inspecting actual cache/resume logic rather than guessing
pattern: removed the temporary test script after confirming behavior
friction: user rejected the push/merge-to-main part of the original ask
friction: multiple correction turns redirected the work
friction: transient socket/api error interrupted mid-task requiring 'tiếp tục'
